sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0

SELECT C.FOLDER_ID, C.FOLDER_NAME, NVL(D.COUNT, 0) AS COUNT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REG_DATE FROM ( SELECT CC.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CC.FOLDER_ID ORDER BY ROWNUM) CNT FROM ( SELECT A.FOLDER_ID, A.FOLDER_NAME, A.REG_DATE FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MEMO B ON A.FOLDER_ID = B.FOLDER_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND A.USER_ID = #user_id# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND A.DELETE_FLAG = 0 ) CC ) C LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT D.FOLDER_ID, COUNT(FOLDER_ID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_MEMO D WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0 group by D.FOLDER_ID) D ON C.FOLDER_ID = D.FOLDER_ID WHERE C.CNT = '1'

SELECT USER_ID, FONT_SIZE, USE_DATE, USE_GADGET, DEFAULT_COLOR, GADGET_RIGHT, GADGET_BOTTOM, LAYER_LEFT, LAYER_TOP, LAYER_WIDTH, LAYER_HEIGHT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, FULL_MODE FROM TBL_MEMO_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#

SELECT MEMO_ID, NVL(CONTENTS, '') AS CONTENTS, DISPLAY_FLAG, WRITE_DATE, ORDERS, FOLDER_ID, COLOR_ID FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0
AND CONTENTS LIKE '%' || #searchInput# || '%'
AND WRITE_DATE >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND WRITE_DATE <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND FOLDER_ID = #folder_id#
ORDER BY ORDERS
ORDER BY WRITE_DATE ASC
ORDER BY WRITE_DATE DESC
SELECT NVL(MAX(ORDERS), '0') +1 FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID=#tenant_id#
SELECT MIN(FOLDER_ID) FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID=#tenant_id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO (memo_id, user_id, write_date, folder_id, orders, company_id, tenant_id, color_id) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_MEMO.NEXTVAL, #user_id#, TO_DATE(#write_date#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #folder_id#, #orders#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, #color_id#)
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG
USE_DATE = #use_date#
USE_GADGET = #use_gadget#
FONT_SIZE = #font_size#
layer_left = #layer_left#
layer_top = #layer_top#
full_mode = #full_mode#
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO_FOLDER (FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, REG_DATE, USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, ORDERS) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_MEMO_FOLDER.NEXTVAL, #folder_name#, TO_DATE(#reg_date#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #user_id#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, #orders#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME = #folder_name# WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET DELETE_FLAG = 1 WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_FOLDER SET DELETE_FLAG = 1 WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET CONTENTS = #contents#, WRITE_DATE = TO_DATE(#write_date#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE MEMO_ID = #memo_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_memo_config (user_id, font_size, use_date, use_gadget, default_color, gadget_right, gadget_bottom, layer_left, layer_top, layer_width, layer_height, company_id, tenant_id) values (#user_id#, #font_size#, #use_date#, #use_gadget#, #default_color#, #gadget_right#, #gadget_bottom#, #layer_left#, #layer_top#, #layer_width#, #layer_height#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO_FOLDER (FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME, REG_DATE, USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, ORDERS, DELETE_FLAG) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_MEMO_FOLDER.NEXTVAL, #folder_name#, TO_DATE(#reg_date#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #user_id#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, #orders#, #delete_flag#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT MEMO_ID, CONTENTS, USER_ID, DISPLAY_FLAG, WRITE_DATE, DELETE_DATE, ORDERS, FOLDER_ID, COLOR_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET DISPLAY_FLAG = #display_flag# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(ORDERS)+1 FROM TBL_MEMO_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET FOLDER_ID = #folder_id# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#

UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET DELETE_DATE = TO_DATE(#delete_date#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), DELETE_FLAG = 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMO (MEMO_ID, USER_ID, WRITE_DATE, FOLDER_ID, ORDERS, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, COLOR_ID, CONTENTS) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_MEMO.NEXTVAL, #user_id#, TO_DATE(#write_date#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #folder_id#, #orders#, #company_id#, #tenant_id#, #color_id#, #contents#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET COLOR_ID = #color_id# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT MEMO_ID, CONTENTS, USER_ID, DISPLAY_FLAG, DELETE_FLAG, WRITE_DATE, DELETE_DATE, ORDERS, FOLDER_ID, COLOR_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_MEMO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND DELETE_FLAG = 0
AND ORDERS <= #bigger_order#
AND ORDERS >= #smaller_order#
order by orders
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_MEMO SET
orders = #orders#
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id# AND MEMO_ID = #memo_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG SET DEFAULT_COLOR = #color_id# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#

UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG
gadget_bottom = #gadget_bottom#
gadget_right = #gadget_right#
WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG SET FULL_MODE = #full_mode# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
UPDATE TBL_MEMO_CONFIG SET LAYER_WIDTH = #layer_width#, LAYER_HEIGHT = #layer_height# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANY_ID = #company_id# AND USER_ID = #user_id#
